name: amd64-microcode
title: amd64-microcode
summary: Platform firmware and microcode for AMD CPUs and SoCs
description:
Platform firmware and microcode for AMD CPUs and SoCs
This package contains microcode patches for AMD AMD64
processors.  AMD releases microcode patches to correct
processor behavior as documented in the respective processor
revision guides.
.
This package includes the required firmware to enable AMD
SEV (Secure Encrypted Virtualization) functionality.
.
This package also includes AMD TAs (Trusted Applications)
required by AMD platform drivers such as AMD PMF (Platform
Management Framework).
.
For Intel processors, please refer to the intel-microcode package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use amd64-microcode because Platform firmware and microcode for AMD CPUs and SoCs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use amd64-microcode as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair amd64-microcode with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `amd64-microcode --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
